name: Inkblot Studio Design System
description: Master index for the Inkblot Studio design system. Use this file to discover all specifications.

tokens.description: W3C DTCG format design tokens — the source of truth for all visual values

system.description: Design system specifications — component rules, layout, motion, AI integration

foundations.description: Core principles, accessibility standards, tech stack, color modes

grid.description: Grid system, breakpoints, z-index, layout patterns

components.description: Full component library: anatomy, states, behavior, accessibility

content.description: Data display, loading/empty/error states, iconography, imagery

ai.description: AI agent rules: rendering, layout assembly, edge cases, testing

aiReference.description: Single-file AI reference: token map, composite patterns, CSS snippets, icon semantics

usage.forAI: Read system/ai.json first, then system/components.json for component specs. Reference tokens via dist/ai/inkblot-tokens-resolved.json.
usage.forDevelopers: Import dist/css/inkblot-variables.css for tokens. Reference system/components.json for implementation specs.
usage.forDesigners: Use tokens/primitive/ as source for Figma variables. Reference system/foundations.json for principles.
